title: Brolin (Kyle) — Dwarf Cleric of Gond
bodyText:
Dwarf cleric of [[gond]] — for career, not conviction. Son of **[[root-darkpass|Root]] Darkpass**. Public savior of [[koviz]] (the F & B posters); private engine of his father's death.

# Where he stands (post-S23)
- **Gond has withdrawn.** The warning dream came true: *"Good deeds done with ill intentions are no good deeds... we will help you this day — but for the last time"* (S13). His magic has been faltering since [[kenas-grove|the grove]].
- **Root is dead by his hand** (with [[eira-cavernborn|Eira]], S20). He publicly declined the guild seat (S22) and deflected the accusations (S23).
- **Eira is his sister** — the ritual revealed they share the same mother (S19).
- **Not on the S24 river-descent roster** — stayed in Koviz? (F & B, the guild vacuum, Gond reckoning?) Record the reason.
- Runs F & B with [[filbert]] (25% profit share drama, board games). Longtime secret friend of [[ms-judy]]; carries her fixation-cursed charisma gifts ([[brolins-elixirs]]).

> [!dm] Open arcs: what does a cleric do when his god hangs up? ("Can someone force themselves to believe?" — his own S19 question.) Ghruom's vendetta points at him eventually. And he still doesn't know the full truth about his mother — see [[roots-journal]] vs [[eira-cavernborn]].

# Threads
[[thread-brolins-faith]] · [[thread-ghruoms-vendetta]] · [[eira-cavernborn]]
